notes: JA Wikipedia uses identical MediaWiki skin (skin-vector-2022) and namespace conventions as EN. Category pages carry ns-14 in bodyClass; article pages carry ns-0. The JA categories here are leaf categories (not 'fully diffused'), so they render actual member page lists: rows=55 for 日本の映画, rows=27 for アメリカ合衆国の映画, rows=8 for イギリスの映画. Must-refuse article pages (映画, 日本映画) return rows=0 as expected. Cross-language structural fingerprints are nearly identical — see tagHist comparison in summary.
